ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "surname" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer (Male/Female) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the customer resides */,
  "job_classification" TEXT /* Job classification of the customer (White Collar/Blue Collar) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the bank */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance in the customer's account */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (Individual/Business) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "number_of_dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents the customer has */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the customer's account (e.g., savings, checking) */,
  "kyc_status" TEXT /* KYC (Know Your Customer) status of the customer */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the customer (Low/Medium/High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Customer ID associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Customer ID associated with the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the account (e.g., savings, checking) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance in the account */,
  "open_date" TEXT /* Date the account was opened */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last activity in the account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account (Active/Inactive/Closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credits" (
  "credit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Customer ID associated with the credit */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit of the customer */,
  "credit_utilization" REAL /* Current credit utilization */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the credit information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Customer ID associated with the log */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* User ID who performed the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
